## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss GrowthX's capabilities and potential collaboration with Webflow on marketplace app strategy and template generation.](https://fathom.video/share/qgEYzHw7Yj-k--zyzj6hr1wnDS-7QxV4?tab=summary&timestamp=305.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX offers end-to-end workflow solutions for content/app generation, from strategy to execution](https://fathom.video/share/qgEYzHw7Yj-k--zyzj6hr1wnDS-7QxV4?tab=summary&timestamp=471.0)
  - [Webflow aims to create a curated selection of app examples to showcase Webflow Cloud capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/qgEYzHw7Yj-k--zyzj6hr1wnDS-7QxV4?tab=summary&timestamp=1045.0)
  - [Potential 8-week sprint collaboration ($30k) to develop \~20 app examples, with ongoing work streams at $15k/month](https://fathom.video/share/qgEYzHw7Yj-k--zyzj6hr1wnDS-7QxV4?tab=summary&timestamp=1704.0)
  - [Timeline considerations: Webflow's public beta in late November, with GTM moment flexibility](https://fathom.video/share/qgEYzHw7Yj-k--zyzj6hr1wnDS-7QxV4?tab=summary&timestamp=2024.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX Capabilities Overview

  - [End-to-end workflow solutions: strategy, execution, and last-mile implementation](https://fathom.video/share/qgEYzHw7Yj-k--zyzj6hr1wnDS-7QxV4?tab=summary&timestamp=471.0)
  - [Examples: Ramp's vendor category content, codelibrary.ai for MCP servers](https://fathom.video/share/qgEYzHw7Yj-k--zyzj6hr1wnDS-7QxV4?tab=summary&timestamp=401.0)
  - [Workflow-as-code with runtime layer and observability](https://fathom.video/share/qgEYzHw7Yj-k--zyzj6hr1wnDS-7QxV4?tab=summary&timestamp=546.0)
  - [Human interventions for quality control ("output bar raisers")](https://fathom.video/share/qgEYzHw7Yj-k--zyzj6hr1wnDS-7QxV4?tab=summary&timestamp=637.0)

### Webflow's App Strategy

  - [Two approaches: AI app gen product and Webflow Cloud (GitHub integration)](https://fathom.video/share/qgEYzHw7Yj-k--zyzj6hr1wnDS-7QxV4?tab=summary&timestamp=1387.0)
  - [Focus on extending marketing sites with full-stack app functionality](https://fathom.video/share/qgEYzHw7Yj-k--zyzj6hr1wnDS-7QxV4?tab=summary&timestamp=1563.0)
  - [Target audience: existing Webflow users building professional marketing sites](https://fathom.video/share/qgEYzHw7Yj-k--zyzj6hr1wnDS-7QxV4?tab=summary&timestamp=1563.0)

### Collaboration Potential

  - [GrowthX can develop workflows exposed as APIs for Webflow](https://fathom.video/share/qgEYzHw7Yj-k--zyzj6hr1wnDS-7QxV4?tab=summary&timestamp=1107.0)
  - [Possibility of building multiple repos for faster development](https://fathom.video/share/qgEYzHw7Yj-k--zyzj6hr1wnDS-7QxV4?tab=summary&timestamp=1447.0)
  - [Mixture of AI-generated and manually built app examples](https://fathom.video/share/qgEYzHw7Yj-k--zyzj6hr1wnDS-7QxV4?tab=summary&timestamp=1506.0)
  - [Emphasis on showcasing marketing site extensions with app functionality](https://fathom.video/share/qgEYzHw7Yj-k--zyzj6hr1wnDS-7QxV4?tab=summary&timestamp=1563.0)

### Project Scope and Timeline

  - [8-week strategy sprint ($30,000) for initial development and calibration](https://fathom.video/share/qgEYzHw7Yj-k--zyzj6hr1wnDS-7QxV4?tab=summary&timestamp=1704.0)
  - [Goal: Launch within 8 weeks, pending internal approvals](https://fathom.video/share/qgEYzHw7Yj-k--zyzj6hr1wnDS-7QxV4?tab=summary&timestamp=1925.0)
  - [Ongoing work streams at $15,000/month per stream](https://fathom.video/share/qgEYzHw7Yj-k--zyzj6hr1wnDS-7QxV4?tab=summary&timestamp=1981.0)
  - [Flexibility in scaling based on volume and complexity requirements](https://fathom.video/share/qgEYzHw7Yj-k--zyzj6hr1wnDS-7QxV4?tab=summary&timestamp=1981.0)

### Example App Showcase

  - [Similar to "Made in Webflow" but focused on web apps](https://fathom.video/share/qgEYzHw7Yj-k--zyzj6hr1wnDS-7QxV4?tab=summary&timestamp=1506.0)
  - [Live examples of fully coded and deployed apps via Webflow Cloud](https://fathom.video/share/qgEYzHw7Yj-k--zyzj6hr1wnDS-7QxV4?tab=summary&timestamp=1506.0)
  - [Inclusion of AI-generated apps with appropriate tagging](https://fathom.video/share/qgEYzHw7Yj-k--zyzj6hr1wnDS-7QxV4?tab=summary&timestamp=1506.0)

### Technical Considerations

  - [GrowthX's workflows built in repos that can be transferred to Webflow](https://fathom.video/share/qgEYzHw7Yj-k--zyzj6hr1wnDS-7QxV4?tab=summary&timestamp=2277.0)
  - [Upcoming open-source framework release (improved version of Langchain)](https://fathom.video/share/qgEYzHw7Yj-k--zyzj6hr1wnDS-7QxV4?tab=summary&timestamp=2277.0)
  - [Emphasis on transparency and long-term ownership of developed solutions](https://fathom.video/share/qgEYzHw7Yj-k--zyzj6hr1wnDS-7QxV4?tab=summary&timestamp=2277.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Webflow team to discuss internal timelines and requirements](https://fathom.video/share/qgEYzHw7Yj-k--zyzj6hr1wnDS-7QxV4?tab=summary&timestamp=2318.0)
  - [Follow up via Slack for further communication and planning](https://fathom.video/share/qgEYzHw7Yj-k--zyzj6hr1wnDS-7QxV4?tab=summary&timestamp=2327.0)
  - [Determine feasibility of 8-week sprint collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/qgEYzHw7Yj-k--zyzj6hr1wnDS-7QxV4?tab=summary&timestamp=1704.0)
  - [Align on specific app examples and functionalities to showcase](https://fathom.video/share/qgEYzHw7Yj-k--zyzj6hr1wnDS-7QxV4?tab=summary&timestamp=1832.0)
